entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS366) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD PRICING FOR ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1853.01E. 2. TO ADD SED PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1859.01E. 3. TO ADD PRICING FOR CSDS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1870.01E. 4. TO ADD SED PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1878.02E. 5. TO ADD SED PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1893.02E. 6. TO ADD SED PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1898.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

TO REDUCE SED PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1906.01P. 7. TO ADD SED PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1910.01E.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. ADDITION OF WIRELINE SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1917.01E. 2. ADDITION OF WIRELINE SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1916.01E. 3. ADDITION OF WIRELINE SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1922.01E. 4. ADDITION OF WIRELINE SEDS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1923.01E. 5. PRICE REDUCTION FOR WIRELINE SEDS CLINS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1914.01P. 6. ADDITION OF NSC ACCESS CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1881.01E. 7. ADDITION OF SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1889.01E 8. ADDITION OF NSC ACCESS CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1886.01E. 9. ADDITION OF CAA ICB CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1864.01E. 10. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS371) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS PRICE FOR PREMISE WIRING AND CABLING AND CASE NUMBER, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1874.01E. 2. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASE FOR PREMISE WIRING AND CABLING FOR ISW, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1888.01E. 3. PRICE REDUCTION FOR PLATINUM PORTS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1909.01P. 4. TO UPDATE INFRASTRUCTURE TABLES, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1901.01S. 5. TO ADD WIRELINE SED TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1913.01E. 6. TO ADD WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NBIP-VPNS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1995.01E. 7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 8. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS372) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
1. TO ADD ONE (1) NET SCOUT SED UNDER THE NETWORX UNIVERSAL CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1857.01E.
2. TO ADD AN EXISTING BUNDLED CHARLES INDUSTRIES SED AS A STANDALONE SED UNDER THE NETWORX UNIVERSAL CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1882.02E.
3. TO ADD ONE (1) RED HAT SED UNDER THE NETWORX UNIVERSAL CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1931.02E.
4. TO ADD ONE (1) SOURCEFIRE SED UNDER THE NETWORX UNIVERSAL CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1937.01E.
5. TO ADD THREE (3) CISCO SEDS UNDER THE NETWORX ENTERPRISE CONTRACT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU1938.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ADDITION OF MANAGED NETWORK SERVICES MNS CLINS, AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU1879.01E. 7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
